instanceUrl.label: Instance URL
instanceUrl.description: The user specific instance URL returned by Salesforce Oauth. This setting is hidden to the user and set by Oauth Service.

isSandbox.label: Sandbox Instance
isSandbox.description: Enable to authenticate into a sandbox instance. You can log in to a sandbox by appending the sandbox name to your Salesforce username. For example, if a username for a production org is user@acme.com and the sandbox is named test, the username to log in to the sandbox is user@acme.com.test. If you are already authenticated, please disconnect and reconnect with your sandbox username.

username.label: Username
username.description: The username of the Salesforce account you want to connect to. When all three of username, password, and security token are provided, a username-password flow is used to authenticate. This field is hidden to all users except those who have opted in to the username+password flow.

auth_password.label: Password
auth_password.description: The password of the Salesforce account you want to connect to. When all three of username, password, and security token are provided, a username-password flow is used to authenticate. This field is hidden to all users except those who have opted in to the username+password flow.

security_token.label: Security Token
security_token.description: The security token of the Salesforce account you want to connect to. When all three of username, password, and security token are provided, a username-password flow is used to authenticate. This value will be appended to the password field to construct the credential used for authentication. This field is hidden to all users except those who have opted in to the username+password flow.

lead.title: Lead
lead.description: Create, update, or upsert leads in Salesforce.

operation.label: Operation
operation.description: The Salesforce operation performed. The available operations are Create, Delete, Update or Upsert records in Salesforce.

choices.label: Update or create a record if one doesn't exist

recordMatcherOperator.label: Record Matchers Operator
recordMatcherOperator.description: This field affects how Segment uses the record matchers to query Salesforce records. By default, Segment uses the "OR" operator to query Salesforce for a record. If you would like to query Salesforce records using a combination of multiple record matchers, change this to "AND".

enable_batching.label: Use Salesforce Bulk API
enable_batching.description: If true, events are sent to [Salesforce’s Bulk API 2.0](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.api_asynch.meta/api_asynch/asynch_api_intro.htm) rather than their streaming REST API. Once enabled, Segment will collect events into batches of 5000 before sending to Salesforce.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

traits.label: Record Matchers
traits.description:
The fields used to find Salesforce records for updates. **This is required if the operation is Delete, Update or Upsert.**

  Any field can function as a matcher, including Record ID, External IDs, standard fields and custom fields. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  If multiple records are found, no changes will be made. **Please use fields that result in unique records.**

  ---

bulkUpsertExternalId.label: Bulk Upsert External Id
bulkUpsertExternalId.description: The external id field name and mapping to use for bulk upsert.

externalIdName.label: External Id Name
externalIdName.description: The external id field name as defined in Salesforce.

externalIdValue.label: External Id Value
externalIdValue.description: The external id field value to use for bulk upsert.

bulkUpdateRecordId.label: Bulk Update Record Id
bulkUpdateRecordId.description: The record id value to use for bulk update.

company.label: Company
company.description: The lead's company. **This is required to create a lead.**

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The lead's last name. **This is required to create a lead.**

postal_code.label: Postal Code
postal_code.description: Postal code for the lead's address.

street.label: Street
street.description: Street number and name for the lead's address.

customFields.label: Other Fields
customFields.description:
Additional fields to send to Salesforce. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  This can include standard or custom fields. Custom fields must be predefined in your Salesforce account and the API field name should have __c appended.

  ---

customObject.title: Custom Object
customObject.description: Create, update, or upsert records in any custom or standard object in Salesforce.

operation.label: Operation
operation.description: The Salesforce operation performed. The available operations are Create, Delete, Update or Upsert records in Salesforce.

bulkUpsertExternalId.description: The external id field name and mapping to use for bulk upsert.

externalIdName.label: External Id Name

externalIdValue.label: External Id Value
externalIdValue.description: The external id field value to use for bulk upsert.

bulkUpdateRecordId.label: Bulk Update Record Id
bulkUpdateRecordId.description: The record id value to use for bulk update.

customObjectName.label: Salesforce Object
customObjectName.description: The API name of the Salesforce object that records will be added or updated within. This can be a standard or custom object. Custom objects must be predefined in your Salesforce account and should end with "__c".

customFields.label: Other Fields
customFields.description:
Additional fields to send to Salesforce. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  This can include standard or custom fields. Custom fields must be predefined in your Salesforce account and the API field name should have __c appended.

  ---

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Create, update, or upsert contacts in Salesforce.

operation.label: Operation
operation.description: The Salesforce operation performed. The available operations are Create, Delete, Update or Upsert records in Salesforce.

choices.label: Update or create a record if one doesn't exist

bulkUpdateRecordId.label: Bulk Update Record Id
bulkUpdateRecordId.description: The record id value to use for bulk update.

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The contact's last name up to 80 characters. **This is required to create a contact.**

first_name.label: First Name
first_name.description: The contact's first name up to 40 characters.

account_id.label: Account ID
account_id.description: The ID of the account that this contact is associated with. This is the Salesforce-generated ID assigned to the account during creation (i.e. 0018c00002CDThnAAH).

mailing_city.label: Mailing City
mailing_city.description: City for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_postal_code.label: Mailing Postal Code
mailing_postal_code.description: Postal Code for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_country.label: Mailing Country
mailing_country.description: Country for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_street.label: Mailing Street
mailing_street.description: Street number and name for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_state.label: Mailing State
mailing_state.description: State for the contact's mailing address.

customFields.label: Other Fields
customFields.description:
Additional fields to send to Salesforce. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  This can include standard or custom fields. Custom fields must be predefined in your Salesforce account and the API field name should have __c appended.

  ---

enable_batching.label: Use Salesforce Bulk API
enable_batching.description: If true, events are sent to [Salesforce’s Bulk API 2.0](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.api_asynch.meta/api_asynch/asynch_api_intro.htm) rather than their streaming REST API. Once enabled, Segment will collect events into batches of 5000 before sending to Salesforce.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

traits.label: Record Matchers
traits.description:
The fields used to find Salesforce records for updates. **This is required if the operation is Delete, Update or Upsert.**

  Any field can function as a matcher, including Record ID, External IDs, standard fields and custom fields. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  If multiple records are found, no changes will be made. **Please use fields that result in unique records.**

  ---

bulkUpsertExternalId.label: Bulk Upsert External Id
bulkUpsertExternalId.description: The external id field name and mapping to use for bulk upsert.

externalIdName.label: External Id Name
externalIdName.description: The external id field name as defined in Salesforce.

externalIdValue.label: External Id Value
externalIdValue.description: The external id field value to use for bulk upsert.

bulkUpdateRecordId.label: Bulk Update Record Id
bulkUpdateRecordId.description: The record id value to use for bulk update.

close_date.label: Close Date
close_date.description: Date when the opportunity is expected to close. Use yyyy-MM-dd format. **This is required to create an opportunity.**

name.label: Name
name.description: A name for the opportunity. **This is required to create an opportunity.**

stage_name.label: Stage Name
stage_name.description: Current stage of the opportunity. **This is required to create an opportunity.**

description.label: Description
description.description: A text description of the opportunity.

customFields.label: Other Fields
customFields.description:
Additional fields to send to Salesforce. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  This can include standard or custom fields. Custom fields must be predefined in your Salesforce account and the API field name should have __c appended.

  ---

contact2.title: Contact V2
contact2.description: Create, update, or upsert contacts in Salesforce.

recordMatcherOperator.label: Record Matchers Operator
recordMatcherOperator.description: This field affects how Segment uses the record matchers to query Salesforce records. By default, Segment uses the "OR" operator to query Salesforce for a record. If you would like to query Salesforce records using a combination of multiple record matchers, change this to "AND".

enable_batching.label: Use Salesforce Bulk API
enable_batching.description: If true, events are sent to [Salesforce’s Bulk API 2.0](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.api_asynch.meta/api_asynch/asynch_api_intro.htm) rather than their streaming REST API. Once enabled, Segment will collect events into batches of 5000 before sending to Salesforce.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

traits.label: Record Matchers
traits.description:
The fields used to find Salesforce records for updates. **This is required if the operation is Delete, Update or Upsert.**

  Any field can function as a matcher, including Record ID, External IDs, standard fields and custom fields. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  If multiple records are found, no changes will be made. **Please use fields that result in unique records.**

  ---

bulkUpsertExternalId.label: Bulk Upsert External Id
bulkUpsertExternalId.description: The external id field name and mapping to use for bulk upsert.

externalIdName.label: External Id Name
externalIdName.description: The external id field name as defined in Salesforce.

externalIdValue.label: External Id Value
externalIdValue.description: The external id field value to use for bulk upsert.

bulkUpdateRecordId.label: Bulk Update Record Id
bulkUpdateRecordId.description: The record id value to use for bulk update.

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The contact's last name up to 80 characters. **This is required to create a contact.**

first_name.label: First Name
first_name.description: The contact's first name up to 40 characters.

account_id.label: Account ID
account_id.description: The ID of the account that this contact is associated with. This is the Salesforce-generated ID assigned to the account during creation (i.e. 0018c00002CDThnAAH).

mailing_city.label: Mailing City
mailing_city.description: City for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_postal_code.label: Mailing Postal Code
mailing_postal_code.description: Postal Code for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_country.label: Mailing Country
mailing_country.description: Country for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_street.label: Mailing Street
mailing_street.description: Street number and name for the contact's mailing address.

mailing_state.label: Mailing State
mailing_state.description: State for the contact's mailing address.

customFields.label: Other Fields
customFields.description:
Additional fields to send to Salesforce. On the left-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. On the right-hand side, input the Salesforce field API name.

  This can include standard or custom fields. Custom fields must be predefined in your Salesforce account and the API field name should have __c appended.

  ---

cases2.title: Case V2
cases2.description: Create, update, or upsert cases in Salesforce.
